recipe.title: Grilled Chicken Kebobs
ingredients: 2½ lb chicken breast, cut into 1.5" cubes
2 green bell peppers, 2 red bell peppers
¼ cup olive oil, 2 cloves garlic (minced)
steps: Mix marinade. Toss chicken in half, veggies in other half. Marinate 30 min–2 hrs.
Thread chicken + veggies onto skewers (soak wood skewers first).
Grill over medium-high heat 12–15 min, turning, until chicken reaches 165°F.
Optional side: rice pilaf, grilled corn, or roasted potatoes.
